title: Stopwatch mod
description: This mod adds 2 commands to the game that opperate a stopwatch. /start to start it and /stop to stop it. The time is not visible whilst the stopwatch is going, but the final time is said in the chat after doing /stop.
body:
This mod adds 2 commands to the game that opperate a stopwatch. /start to start it and /stop to stop it. The time is not visible whilst the stopwatch is going, but the final time is said in the chat after doing /stop. 

 

This mod is perfect for custom minigames amoung you and you friends.

It's easy to use and very user friendly.
